issue-2
1. This month's Traffic Pros features the top YouTube traffic guy, Dan Rose. Dan and his partner, Mike
Chang, have the number one fitness site on all of YouTube and they did it without a budget,
spending less than $300 a month to start, and built a multi million dollar business in less than three
years.
2. To give you an idea of how powerful these strategies are, we show you the top viewed YouTube
video for the largest fitness company in the world (over a billion in net revenue) versus Dan and
Mike's home made YouTube videos (several of them), which are used to give information and drive
targeted leads to their 3X style VSL. Their video(s) have almost twice as many views almost 12
million for one alone!
3. These secrets can be the great equalizer, allowing smaller marketers to seize control over their
much larger competition, and drive crazy traffic to your VSL.
4. Dan reveals ALL of his free and inexpensive traffic tips for YouTube, and exactly how you can use
YouTube to drive a lot of qualified leads to your VSL! This is by far the most in depth interview Dan
has ever given on traffic, YouTube secrets, and VSLs, so be sure to take notes.

-- 1 of 1 --
